commit.message:
Fix bot 409 conflict: retry with backoff instead of crashing

When Telegram returns 409 (another getUpdates request), wait
5-30s and retry instead of crashing the process, which caused
Docker to instantly restart and repeat the conflict loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix startDungeonRun 500 by adding indexes and simplifying query

The dungeon reset cooldown query used status 'in' + orderBy which
requires a composite index that didn't exist. Split into two simple
equality queries to work without complex indexes. Also added all
needed dungeon_runs and dungeons composite indexes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

SEV-1: Alinear estados entre Booking, Payment y BookingPayment

- Nuevo campo paymentMethod (online|presential|exempt) como fuente de verdad del canal de pago
- Campos checkout: checkoutSessionId, checkoutSessionExpiresAt, checkoutLockUntil para idempotencia
- Helper centralizado payment-sync.ts: sincronizarEstadoPago, asegurarBookingPayments, generarDatosPagoPorJugador
- Stamp paymentMethod en todas las rutas de creacion (admin, cron, open-matches, player)
- Checkout idempotente con lock atomico en DB (updateMany) y reutilizacion de sessions activas
- Webhook con guard atomico (updateMany where status=confirmed) + refund si booking cancelado
- Guards exempt en cobrar todo, player-payments PATCH y POST regeneracion
- Cobrar todo usa asegurarBookingPayments antes de marcar paid
- Cancelacion jugador expira checkout session y limpia campos
- Reschedule con 4 ramas (exempt/presential/online-pending/online-paid) + fail-closed para legacy null
- Open matches: booking confirmed (no provisional), sin BookingPayments en partidas exempt
- Cron auto-cancel usa createdAt + paymentMethod=online (sin fallback null)
- BookingPayments creados en transaccion (no fire-and-forget)
- Script backfill SQL en dos fases (automatica + auditoria manual)
- 278 tests pasando, build limpio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix offset always targets later DOM item, never the earlier one

Replace OG/AA/BB proximity checks with a single rule: compare the
current item's offsetTop against its immediately preceding sibling
(el.previousElementSibling), regardless of column. If within 40px,
the current item — which is later in DOM order — gets bo=1 and its
badge/arrow are pushed down. The earlier item is never touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(db): search_formations_manual_v1 — column f.taux_acces does not exist (prod 500)

Migration 054 dropped formations.taux_acces. The RPC still referenced it
directly, causing 42703 on every /api/search/manual call.

Fix: LEFT JOIN LATERAL formations_stats for taux_acces (canonical source).
- VOLATILE → STABLE (Patricio: read-only, better planning)
- Index (formation_id, session DESC) for O(1) lateral lookup (Sergio)
- session is INT (2024, 2025) — ORDER BY DESC is safe (Patricio)

* fix(api): remove premature deprecation warning from /api/actions/log

The endpoint is NOT deprecated — it serves legacy dashboard action logging
(NowSection impressions, clicks, completes with rt:/seed: prefixed IDs).
/api/actions/events (WP7) has a different contract (engine, surface, phase
required, no impression support) and serves ConcreteActions telemetry.

Removes warnDeprecated() call that was generating prod warnings on every
action logger call.

commit.message:
fix(tdx-basic): make tdx describe more discoverable for schema inspection (#112)

## Summary
- Added `tdx describe` to the skill description so it triggers on schema
inspection queries
- Created a dedicated **Schema Inspection** section with `tdx describe`
and `tdx desc` alias
- Showed fully-qualified form (`tdx desc mydb.users`) that works without
session context
- Added guidance to run `tdx describe` first when exploring unfamiliar
tables

Previously, `tdx describe` was only shown inline within context
management examples, making it easy for AI to miss when users ask about
checking table schemas.

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify AI correctly suggests `tdx describe` or `tdx desc` when
asked to check a table schema
- [ ] Verify fully-qualified `tdx desc database.table` form is suggested
without requiring session context

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
fix: defer Supabase client init to useEffect to prevent SSR prerender crash

createClient() was called synchronously in the component body, which runs
during server-side rendering even for "use client" components. Moved it
inside useEffect (which never runs on the server) using a ref to hold the
client instance. Fixes Vercel build failure on static pages (/, /pricing,
/about) when NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is not set at build time.

commit.message:
fix: normalize spatial utility by sqrt(D) to balance identity/spatial dimensions

Spatial utility with 28 issue dimensions accumulated to magnitudes 5-15x
larger than ethnic/religious identity utility, making ethnicity and religion
nearly irrelevant in vote choice. Added sqrt(D) normalization divisor
(spatial_normalization parameter on EngineParams) applied in both
spatial.py functions and the inlined hot loop in poststratification.py.

Recalibrated: beta_s=3.0, scale=1.5, tau_0=4.5 for the normalized regime.
Ethnic heartlands now hold: NDC wins 144/166 Hausa LGAs, CND wins
Yoruba, IPA wins 104/105 Igbo LGAs. National turnout ~46% (appropriate
for post-authoritarian first election).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor(diff): rewrite `handleDiff` to reuse `streamingEdit`

`handleDiff` previously reimplemented edit application via a separate
in-memory path (`prepareFile` → `buildOps` → `applyEdits` →
`unifiedDiff`), duplicating the streaming edit engine. Replace this
with:

  validatePath → validateEdits → streamingEdit(dryRun: true)
    → readFile both → createTwoFilesPatch → unlink temp

Key changes:

- Add `dryRun` parameter to `streamingEdit`. When true, the temp file
  is kept (not renamed over the original or cleaned up on no-op), and
  `tmpPath` is returned in the success result so the caller can read
  it. Error paths still clean up unconditionally.
- Rewrite `handleDiff` to delegate to `streamingEdit` in dry-run mode,
  then diff the original against the temp file. Drop the `unifiedDiff`
  helper — `createTwoFilesPatch` is called directly on the raw file
  strings that `streamingEdit` already wrote with correct EOL handling.
- Remove now-dead `prepareFile`, `buildOps`, and their types from
  `shared.ts`, along with imports only they needed (`readFile`,
  `parseContent`, `verifyChecksum`, `verifyHashes`).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Improve KB search: OR-style FTS + keyword ILIKE fallback

- FTS now uses OR-joined tsquery instead of AND (plainto_tsquery),
  so "leave policy" matches chunks containing either word, ranked
  by how many keywords match
- ILIKE fallback now splits query into individual keywords instead
  of searching for the exact full phrase
- Strips stop-words for cleaner search queries
- Fixes issue where "how many days of leave" returned no KB results

commit.message:
Initial release: repo-doctor v0.1.0

CLI tool that scans any repository and generates missing open-source
meta-files (README, LICENSE, CI, CONTRIBUTING, etc.) to make it
professional and open-source-ready.

- 17 rules across 6 categories (basics, community, build, hygiene, security, reproducibility)
- scan mode: analyze repo, score 0-100 with A/B/C/D grades, MD+JSON reports
- fix mode: staged ChangePlan with diff preview, auto-generate missing files
- init mode: interactive config setup
- Stack detection: Python, Node, Rust, Go, Swift
- Safe by default: never deletes files, never touches source code
- 79 tests covering rules, engine, fixer, reporter, templates, and CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: repo-doctor

Replace per-point sqrt with lookup table in build_line_fit_pts

Since gx/gy are always in {-255, 0, 255}, there are only 4 distinct
gradient magnitude values. Use a precomputed lookup table indexed by
(gx != 0) << 1 | (gy != 0) to eliminate sqrt calls in the hot loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use fresh quotation_id when generating shipping labels

The quoting endpoint merges rates from single-package and multi-package
quotations. The frontend's stored quotation_id could belong to a
different package count than the actual labelsCount, causing Skydropx
to reject with "paquetes no coincide con los cotizados".

Now the generate endpoint always uses the fresh quote's quotation_id
and matches the carrier/service from the user's selection.

commit.message:
fix: remove "use client" from dashboards layout to fix async component error

The dashboards layout was marked as a client component but only renders
ErrorBoundary (which has its own "use client"). This caused a React error
when navigating client-side from /suites/operations (async server component)
to /dashboards/bom/history — React tried to render the async component in
a client boundary context.

Fixes JAVASCRIPT-NEXTJS-9

commit.message:
v10.1.2109: Fix materials tab + farmerData SyntaxError

Root cause: Jinja2 autoescaping converted '""' to '""' in the
amasUser field of window.farmerData, causing "Unexpected token '&'"
SyntaxError. This broke window.farmerData entirely, so farmer_id
defaulted to 1, and /farmer/1/materials-inventory returned 403.

Fixes:
1. Add |safe to all '""' fallbacks in farmerData block
2. Switch materials fetch to /farmer/api/materials (session-auth, no
   farmer_id in URL) as defense-in-depth
3. Add is_active filter and logging to /farmer/api/materials endpoint

Remove Storage identity map from repositories (#138)

The request-scoped cache added unnecessary complexity (cache-check-then-fetch
boilerplate, manual invalidation, cross-repo cache dependencies) while data
is rarely re-read within a request. Repositories now query the ORM directly.

commit.message:
Fix teammate re-send loops and improve shutdown reliability

- Track deliverable_sent flag to detect when teammate already sent work to lead
- Early-exit the turn loop when deliverable sent AND all tasks completed
- Inject system nudge after first deliverable telling agent to mark tasks
  complete and stop re-sending
- Separate sent_shutdown from should_stop so auto-shutdown fires correctly
  even when early-exit triggered
- Increase leader nudge interval from 60s to 120s to reduce unnecessary
  status check messages during normal operation

commit.message:
Add persistent install (LaunchAgent/systemd), watch mode, CVE detection

- install/uninstall/status subcommands via lib/service.js
  (macOS LaunchAgent, Linux systemd, Windows graceful message)
- Watch mode (lib/watcher.js): periodic re-scan every 30m,
  grade history in ~/.openclaw/.dashboard-logs/grade-history.jsonl
- --service flag (LaunchAgent/systemd internal): watch enabled, no browser
- --watch / --watch-interval flags for foreground watch mode
- GET /api/watch endpoint for watcher state
- CVE-2026-28363 safeBins bypass check (CRITICAL)
- ClawJacked WebSocket brute-force check (CRITICAL)
- sandbox.mode configuration check
- npm version check on status command (cached daily)
- Dashboard footer: watch status indicator
- Updated banner with install hint for npx users

Fix StreamlitAPIException on AI Recommendations alert level filter

default=["Critical", "High — Semantic", "High — GSC"] crashed when

available levels if none of the preferred ones are present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: section Visibilité (Score, Écosystème, Lieu) + Tourinsoft prioritaire sur DATA Tourisme

Visibilité — Score de visibilité :
- Onglet complet : SERPs principal + 7 commerciales, SERP consolidée, PAA, KG, avis
- Section sémantique : colonne droite = top 20 mots-clés par ETV de l'URL principale
- Colonne gauche : opportunités marché = related_keywords absents de tous les positionnés
- norm() : normalisation accents/apostrophes pour matching inter-sources fiable
- ETV calculé côté serveur (ranked/route.ts) : CTR × volume — DataForSEO ne le retourne pas
- Historique : bouton œil "Consulter" pour recharger une analyse passée (loadAnalysis)
- Sauvegarde + historique Supabase (visibility_analyses)

Visibilité — Écosystème digital :
- Détection automatique acteurs officiels via DataForSEO SERP (organic + local_pack)
- Classification OpenAI (OT / Station / Institutionnel / Parc / Autre_officiel)
- Enrichissement Haloscan bulk (trafic, keywords, authorityScore)
- Sauvegarde + historique + rechargement depuis Supabase (ecosystem_analyses)

Visibilité — Lieu touristique :
- Analyse SERP lieu + GMB + SERP commune + Haloscan bulk (lieu + commune)
- Diagnostic GPT : headline + recommandations actionnables
- Navigation partagée : VisibiliteTabNav (Écosystème / Lieu touristique)

Territoire — Tourinsoft ANMSM prioritaire :
- Si Tourinsoft a des données pour le code postal → les utiliser (pas de déduplication possible)
- Sinon → fallback DATA Tourisme (comportement précédent)
- tourinsofrVersEtablissements() convertit les items Tourinsoft en Etablissement[]
- Microservice : routes /tourinsoft/* + chargerTourinsoft() au démarrage

Migrations Supabase : 006 (ecosystem), 007 (visibility), 008 (place), 009 (territoire)

commit.message:
Fix badge overlap for left-column items near right-column items

Previously the offset logic only fired for right/inverted items (pos > 0).
A left item starting close to a right item's badge (common after column
re-balancing) would get no offset and overlap on the center line.

JS: also set bo=1 when a left item (pos=0) starts within 40px of the
previous right item's offsetTop (Math.abs(e.o - r.o) < 40).

CSS: broaden selector from .mo-inverted.offset to .offset so both
left and right items shift their badge/arrow down when flagged.

Synced into docs/index.html (inlined CSS + runtime).
